title: 2 PCS Silicone Spatula Wood Handle, Rubber Spatulas for Cooking, Small Spatula Silicone Jar Scraper, Small Rubber Spatulas for Kitchen Cooking, Baking, Mixing
features: Reliable Material: Our wood handle spatula is made from high quality oak and silicone, which resists high temperatures, has smooth edges without burrs, does not crack or deform easily and can be used for a long time.
Thoughtful Design: This rubber spatula wooden handle is ergonomically designed, the wooden handle is smooth and the polishing process makes it more comfortable to hold.
Suitable Size: The size of the large silicone spatula is 31.5 cm*5.5 cm/12.4 in*2.16 in, and the size of the small silicone scraper is 23 cm*2.5 cm/9.05 in*0.98 in, which is easy to grip and use.
Easy to Care: Our silicone spatula with wooden handle is easy to clean and can be wiped, washed in the dishwasher, and rinsed with water, saving you time.
Wide Application: The rubber spatula set is ideal for baking, frying, making sauces, etc. It can also be used to clean sauce jars and make cakes, and has a wide range of uses.
description: Our wood handle spatula is ergonomically designed, the wooden handle has a smooth contour design, and the polishing process makes it more comfortable to hold.
